items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for source-type-aware drilldown while preserving one global queue.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding source-type-aware drilldown and global queue preservation. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this requirement has been implemented or validated. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature but lacks concrete evidence to confirm its existence, leading to an inconclusive status.
